## Summary
Briefly describe the spec/schema changes. Link the RFC issue if applicable.

## Checklist
- [ ] Spec file(s) under `specs/` with correct front matter
- [ ] Normative vs Informative sections are clear
- [ ] JSON Schemas added/updated under `schemas/` with unique `$id`
- [ ] Examples placed under `examples/` (none embedded in specs)
- [ ] Discovery/media type mappings match ARKY-WIRE / ARKY-MEDIA-TYPES
- [ ] If vectors changed: manifests updated; `vectors/RELEASES.json` hashes updated
- [ ] Links resolve; no dead `links:` entries in front matter

## Breaking Changes
Explain if any and the migration path.

## Screenshots/Artifacts (optional)
Include diffs or rendered snippets if helpful.
